content.markdownBody:
## 📄 Arxiv 前沿论文

> **爬取时间**：2026-05-29 08:59:39 UTC

本表数据来自 Arxiv 检索，关键词组「(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl|reinforcement learning)」，时间窗口 2026-05-15 ~ 2026-05-21。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 学科类别 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|----------|
| 8 | GeoX: Mastering Geospatial Reasoning Through Self-Play and Verifiable Rewards | 提出自博弈与可验证奖励机制，提升地理空间推理能力，可用于无人机航迹规划与场景理解 | http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20006v1 | 地理空间推理,自博弈,可验证奖励,无人机 | 2026-05-19 | cs.AI |

本表数据来自 Semantic Scholar 检索，关键词组「(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl)」，时间窗口 2026-05-15 ~ 2026-05-21。

本周无符合关键词的检索结果。

## 📚 OpenAlex

本表数据来自 OpenAlex 检索，关键词组「(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl)」，时间窗口 2026-05-15 ~ 2026-05-21。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 来源/venue | 引用数 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|------------|--------|
| 9 | A cognitive synergetic hierarchical framework for UAV swarm combat via speculative inference and role-decoupled reinforcement learning | 提出认知协同层级框架，结合推测推理与角色解耦强化学习，应用于无人机集群空战 | https://doi.org/10.3389/fnbot.2026.1799054 | 无人机集群,空战,强化学习,推测推理 | 2026-05-19 | Frontiers in Neurorobotics | 0 |
| 9 | Shared Backbone PPO for Multi-UAV Communication Coverage with Connection Preservation | 提出共享骨干 PPO 算法，兼顾多无人机通信覆盖与连接保持 | https://openalex.org/W7161917112 | 多无人机,通信覆盖,PPO,共享骨干 | 2026-05-18 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 8 | SkyNative: A Native Multimodal Framework for Remote Sensing Visual Evidence Reasoning | 提出原生多模态框架，专注遥感视觉证据推理，适用于无人机遥感分析 | https://openalex.org/W7161916221 | 遥感,多模态,视觉语言模型,无人机 | 2026-05-18 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 8 | PiLoT: Neural Pixel-to-3D Registration for UAV-based Ego and Target Geo-localization | 提出神经像素到3D配准技术，实现无人机自我与目标地理定位 | https://github.com/nudt-sawlab/PiLoT | 无人机,地理定位,3D配准,CVPR2026 | 2026-05-18 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 7 | A Survey on Agentic AI-Assisted UAV Swarm Systems Using Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning | 综述智能体AI辅助下的无人机集群系统与多智能体深度强化学习 | https://doi.org/10.22214/ijraset.2026.82488 | 无人机集群,智能体AI,深度强化学习,综述 | 2026-05-18 | International Journal for Research in Applied Science and Engineering Technology | 0 |
| 7 | LLM-Guided Communication for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning | 利用LLM引导多智能体强化学习通信，提升协作效率 | https://openalex.org/W7161915044 | 多智能体强化学习,LLM,通信,协作 | 2026-05-18 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 6 | Revisiting EdgeAI through the lens of communication, storage and computing optimisations | 探讨边缘AI在通信、存储与计算方面的优化策略 | https://doi.org/10.55056/jec.1054 | 边缘AI,通信优化,存储优化,计算优化 | 2026-05-17 | Journal of Edge Computing | 1 |
| 6 | Collaborative Air-Ground Sensing, Communication, Computing, Storage, and Intelligence for Low-Altitude Economy | 提出低空经济的空地协同感知与智能框架 | https://openalex.org/W7161915019 | 低空经济,空地协同,感知,智能 | 2026-05-18 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 6 | Accelerating Autonomous System Evaluation via Reinforcement Learning Driven Large Language Model Agents | 利用强化学习驱动的LLM智能体加速自主系统评估 | https://doi.org/10.66280/ijair.v1i2.148 | 自主系统,LLM,强化学习,评估 | 2026-05-19 | International Journal for Artificial Intelligence Research | 0 |
| 5 | PIMbot: A Self-Adaptive Attack Framework for Adversarial Manipulation of Multi-Robot Reinforcement Learning | 提出针对多机器人强化学习的对抗性操纵攻击框架 | https://openalex.org/W7162474643 | 多机器人,对抗攻击,强化学习,安全 | 2026-05-21 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 5 | Against the Monolithic Wireless World Model: Why NextG Needs Composable and Agentic Intelligence | 探讨6G网络需要可组合与智能体化AI的原因 | https://openalex.org/W7161916941 | 6G,无线世界模型,智能体AI | 2026-05-15 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 4 | ManiSoft: Towards Vision-Language Manipulation for Soft Continuum Robotics | 探索软体机器人的视觉语言操作，与无人机关联较弱 | https://openalex.org/W7161916559 | 视觉语言,软体机器人,操作 | 2026-05-18 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 3 | Curriculum Group Policy Optimization: Adaptive Sampling for Unleashing the Potential of Text-to-Image Generation | 文本到图像生成的课程组策略优化，与无人机主题无关 | https://openalex.org/W7161916900 | 文本生成图像,强化学习,课程学习 | 2026-05-18 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 3 | Generating Realistic Safety-Critical Scenarios for Vehicle-Pedestrian Interactions | 生成安全关键的车辆-行人交互场景，与无人机无关 | https://openalex.org/W7161916438 | 自动驾驶,场景生成,安全 | 2026-05-17 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
